message:
fix(writing): improve Bakery and RaptorQ article layouts

Bakery article improvements:
- Add AnimatePresence import for future animation support
- Change hero section from justify-center to justify-start with padding
- Add explicit pt-24/pt-32 padding to hero for better mobile layout
- Fix title line-height with !leading-[1.1] for mobile, !leading-[0.85] desktop
- Fix JSX/template literal syntax in code block display
- Properly escape curly braces and < characters in code examples
- Close template literals correctly before inline JSX tooltip elements

RaptorQ article:
- Minor formatting adjustments for consistency

These changes ensure proper rendering on mobile devices and fix
Turbopack parsing errors in the code display sections.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -180,12 +180,12 @@ export function RaptorQArticle() {
       />
 
       {/* ========== HERO ========== */}
-      <section data-section="hero" className="min-h-screen flex flex-col justify-center relative overflow-hidden pb-20">
+      <section data-section="hero" className="min-h-screen flex flex-col justify-start relative overflow-hidden pb-20 pt-24 md:pt-32">
         <HeroParticles />
         <div className="absolute inset-0 bg-gradient-to-b from-transparent via-[#020204]/60 to-[#020204] z-10" />
 
         <EC>
-          <div className="text-center pt-48 md:pt-32 relative z-20">
+          <div className="text-center relative z-20">
             <div className="inline-flex items-center gap-3 mb-12 px-4 md:px-6 py-2.5 rounded-full border border-white/10 bg-white/5 text-[11px] md:text-[12px] font-mono text-cyan-400 tracking-[0.3em] uppercase backdrop-blur-xl">
               <span className="w-2 h-2 bg-cyan-400 rounded-full animate-pulse" />
               Protocol Intelligence / RFC 6330
